title: Gap Closure, Deliberate Practice, and Honest Positioning · Career Evidence Triage
summary: A realistic gap closure, deliberate practice, and honest positioning artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.
Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case.
Precommit a time, evidence, and opportunity-cost stop rule for readiness work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Gap Priority
steps.instruction:
debug case — Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The debug variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.

Inspect the Gap Priority trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Gap Priority.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Gap Priority, keep Gap Priority connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Gap Priority, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Gap Priority, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Gap Priority precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Gap Priority, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The debug variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Gap Priority, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Every missing keyword needs a new credential before applying.

stimulus.title: Gap Priority case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The debug variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Every missing keyword needs a new credential before applying.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing. Artifact under review: time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan.

options.text: For inspect the failure record, apply Gap Priority without its stated preconditions, omit the time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Gap Priority for time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan.
The record names the assumption, applies Gap Priority, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Gap Priority record says time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Gap Priority.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Apply Learn Loop
steps.instruction:
Append a career-apply-learn-loop-1i1p1j: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Apply Learn Loop.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Apply Learn Loop into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Apply Learn Loop, keep Apply Learn Loop connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.code:
career-apply-learn-loop-1i1p1j:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Apply Learn Loop structural check is only one gate. time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Apply Learn Loop, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Apply Learn Loop precondition, or invariant that must hold.

The debug variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Interleave bounded applications, feedback signals, retrieval, projects, and plan revision without training on random rejection noise.

For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Apply Learn Loop, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: All application outcomes identify the exact skill gap to fix.
